Bug report：Describe the problems you encounter in your studies. 

🔸Before asking, please make sure to avoid invalid or redundant questions.
1. Are you sure Google can’t solve your problem?
2. Are you sure existing issues can’t solve your problem?
3. Are you sure the issue title follows this format: [tutorial-code]: description
4. Describe the bug. A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
5. Have you read ECHO's documentation?
6. This is an open-source project. Developers and other users are not obliged to solve your problem, so when you ask a question, please be polite and patient.

🔸To Reproduce 
#Steps to reproduce the behavior#: 
(Please replace the content marked with ”**“ with your own words)

**Go to '...' 
**Click on '....'
**Scroll down to '....'
**See error

**Expected behavior 
**A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. 
**!!!!LOG is necessary!!!!
**#Screenshots# If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.
